TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Christian_Alexander, title = Christian_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christian_Alexander} }

S.FORM: Christian Alexander kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 4, Christian Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na mincyogun Alexander htgan na ryax maki Bulgarian,yaya ru yaba nya maki Athens. tmasoq mqwas biru beh Beverly Hills pqwasan biru gocyu Beverly Hills, California. 2011kawas mhtuw telibi ABC Family's The Lying Game. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Christian Alexander kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 4, Christian Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na mincyogun Alexander htgan na ryax maki Bulgarian,yaya ru yaba nya maki Athens. tmasoq mqwas biru beh Beverly Hills pqwasan biru gocyu Beverly Hills, California. 2011kawas mhtuw telibi ABC Family's The Lying Game. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na minʦ~ʨjoɣun alexan*er ħtɣan na rjax maki βulɣarian,jaja ru jaβa nja maki atħens~ɕ. tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ βe*erlj ħills~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru ɣoʦ~ʨju βe*erlj ħills~ɕ, ʦ~ʨali*ornia. ****kawas~ɕ mħtuw teliβi aβʦ~ʨ *amiljʔs~ɕ tħe ljiŋ ɣame. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
